summary: Used rg to search for 'deepseek' in providers.json (output truncated) and Python to list deepseek models from hyper.json, revealing two models: deepseek-v4-flash and deepseek-v4-pro.
title: Verify deepseek models in Crush config

evidence.steps_json:
[{"cmd":"rg '"deepseek"' /home/lauer/.local/share/crush/providers.json","outcome":"[{"name":"Anthropic","id":"anthropic","api_key":"$ANTHROPIC_API_KEY","api_endpoint":"$ANTHROPIC_API_ENDPOINT","type":"anthropic","default_large_model_"},{"cmd":"python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/home/lauer/.local/share/crush/hyper.json')); [print(m['id'], '-', m['name']) for m in d['models'] if 'deepseek' in m['id']]"","outcome":"deepseek-v4-flash - DeepSeek V4 Flash
deepseek-v4-pro - DeepSeek V4 Pro


<cwd>/home/lauer/.config/crush</cwd>"}]
